summary: A Fox News breaking-news clip presented as a split screen: a man in a Border Patrol uniform speaks via remote at left, identified by a lower-third as a CBP official, while the right shows street footage of numerous Chicago police officers and vehicles. Chyrons read 'BREAKING NEWS' and 'BORDER PATROL CHIEF RESPONDS TO WEEKEND SHOOTING'.

script.scene: Split screen: a uniformed CBP official speaks remotely at left; Chicago police gather in street footage at right; chyron about a weekend shooting.

notable_text: BREAKING NEWS; GREGORY BOVINO CBP CHIEF PATROL AGENT; BORDER PATROL CHIEF RESPONDS TO WEEKEND SHOOTING
